meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no SaaS knowledge (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no SaaS knowledge. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code Skills Setup for SaaS Success
content.seo_description: Master Claude Code skills to overcome SaaS knowledge gaps. Use this intermediate checklist to ship faster, impress clients, and build high-quality apps.
content.answer_block: Overcoming SaaS knowledge gaps requires bridging architectural intent with rapid execution. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you transform high-level requirements into production-ready code. This workflow automates boilerplate generation and logic implementation, allowing you to focus on client delivery while maintaining professional-grade technical standards and architectural integrity.
content.intro:
The client is waiting, the deadline is a ticking clock, and the sheer complexity of the SaaS architecture is threatening to stall your momentum. You aren't lacking talent; you're lacking a leverage-heavy workflow that bridges the gap between raw intent and functional, scalable code.

Today, we stop fighting the boilerplate and start engineering at the speed of thought. By mastering the synergy between Claude Code and Antigravity, you move from a developer struggling with infrastructure to an AI-assisted architect capable of shipping production-grade SaaS solutions in a fraction of the time.

steps.title: Initialize SaaS Project Structure
steps.description: Establish a clean, scalable folder structure that follows industry standard best practices to ensure your code remains maintainable as the project grows.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a boilerplate project structure for a SaaS application using Next.js, Tailwind, and Supabase, emphasizing modular component design and clean architecture.

steps.title: Configure Authentication Logic
steps.description: Abstract the complexity of auth flows by defining secure, reusable patterns that handle sessions and user permissions across your application.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a secure authentication provider wrapper for Supabase, including protected routes and user session management middleware.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Implement auth middleware for /dashboard routes"

steps.title: Define Database Schemas
steps.description: Use AI to transform your business requirements into highly optimized SQL schemas that reduce query latency and ensure data integrity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a PostgreSQL schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application, including tables for users, subscriptions, and project resources.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Generate migration files based on the schema definition"

steps.title: Implement API Route Handlers
steps.description: Standardize your backend responses to ensure your frontend consumes data predictably, reducing debugging time during client handoffs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a set of RESTful API route handlers for resource management with error handling and request validation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Create CRUD endpoints for the projects table"

steps.title: Automate Deployment Pipeline
steps.description: Configure your CI/CD flow so that every commit is vetted and deployed, giving you confidence that your code works in production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a GitHub Actions workflow for automated testing and staging deployment for a Vercel-hosted Next.js application.

pro_tips: Use Claude Code's memory feature to store client-specific coding styles so every file generated feels like it was written by the same hand.
Always run a dry-run check on migration scripts generated by AI to ensure foreign key constraints are properly indexed.
Leverage Antigravity's 'refactor' mode before pushing to production to identify and strip out redundant legacy code blocks.
Keep your context window clean by summarizing completed milestones in a README-AI.md file, which you can inject back into Claude Code.
Use custom system prompts in Claude Code to force the output to adhere strictly to your preferred TypeScript configuration.
content.next_steps: After completing this setup, conduct a security audit on your generated API routes and deploy to a staging environment to verify the end-to-end user flow.
content.conversion_block: Stop building from scratch and start building at scale. You now have the blueprint to turn complex SaaS requirements into professional assets in hours, not weeks. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
